content:textarea:5:11.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:5:11.html: If you’re looking for a way to directly support the individuals and families staying at our shelter, we’ve compiled a list of needs below. These are some of the most helpful donations at this time — though it’s not a complete list, it reflects our most pressing needs and is updated monthly.

  • Brushes & combs
